benefits.description: Nagging pain relief in tendinous areas within 15-20 seconds of local injection

protocol_notes: Reports using BPC-157 with local subQ injection near injury site in fat supply and direct intramuscular/tendon injection. States internal medicine doctor recommended local injection near site or mixing with PRP injections for increased benefit. User reports significant personal success with localized injection protocol for tendinosis. Notes varies by individual and different for non-muscle/tendon pain.
